findings.title: asyncio.gather with return_exceptions=False causes one crop failure to abort entire batch
findings.why_it_matters: When any inpaint_single() task raises an exception, gather() immediately cancels remaining tasks and re-raises. With 100 crops and batch_size=4, one failure at position 47 halts 53% through, wasting 25+ GPU invocations. Pipeline cannot recover from transient ComfyUI errors.
evidence: Line 177: asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=False)
Line 184: Same pattern in final batch
InpaintConfig lacks timeout field; line 97 uses hasattr fallback defaulting to 300s even for 4-crop batches taking 600s
findings.suggested_fix: Use return_exceptions=True to capture both Path and Exception objects. Filter results into successful paths and failed indices. Optionally retry failed crops with exponential backoff if config.enable_inpaint_retry=True.

findings.title: Zip mismatch: no validation that results count equals input pairs count
findings.why_it_matters: If inpaint_batch() returns fewer results than crop_indices due to exception dropping, zip() silently truncates mapping. Frames 47+ get no inpainted entry, causing _stitch_frames() to skip them. Frames dropped from output without error signal.
evidence: Line 318-319: for idx, (frame_idx, result_path) in enumerate(zip(crop_indices, results))
No assertion: assert len(results) == len(crop_indices)
_stitch_frames() line 349-350 silently continues if frame_idx not in inpainted dict
findings.suggested_fix: Add assertion: if len(results) != len(crop_indices): raise RuntimeError(...). Or with return_exceptions=True, map failed indices explicitly.

findings.title: Health check timeout only 5 seconds; ComfyUI model load takes 30+ seconds
findings.why_it_matters: aiohttp.ClientTimeout(total=5) fails on slow startup or high load. ComfyUI model load takes 30+ seconds. Health check fails before pipeline starts, blocking cleanup opportunity if async resources created earlier.
evidence: Line 255: async with session.get(url, timeout=aiohttp.ClientTimeout(total=5))
ProcessConfig.timeout=300s applies to inpaint, not preflight
findings.suggested_fix: Use configurable timeout: health_timeout = self.config.timeout if hasattr(self.config, 'health_check_timeout') else 30.0

findings.title: ComfyUIClient context manager unprotected against reentry; concurrent calls create multiple sessions
findings.why_it_matters: Multiple InpaintExecutor instances each open own aiohttp session. If pipeline calls _inpaint_crops() again after error recovery, new session leaks. No cleanup of lingering connections.
evidence: Line 87: async with ComfyUIClient(...) as client:
InpaintExecutor has no __aenter__/__aexit__; multiple instances = multiple sessions
No pooling or singleton pattern
findings.suggested_fix: Add class-level _session dict keyed by (host, port) to reuse connections across instances.

findings.title: Preprocessing exception handler only catches FileNotFoundError; OSError/IOError not caught
findings.why_it_matters: Disk full or permission denied on frame 50: OSError raised and uncaught. skip_errors_in_preprocessing only suppresses FileNotFoundError. Pipeline halts; no resume from frame 51.
evidence: Line 195-199: except FileNotFoundError as e: if self.config.skip_errors_in_preprocessing
Line 159 loop processes sequentially with no recovery point
findings.suggested_fix: Broaden except clause: except (FileNotFoundError, OSError, IOError) as e: with selective re-raise based on skip_errors flag.

findings.title: Generic except Exception in run() hides root cause when cleanup() itself fails
findings.why_it_matters: If inpainting fails with TimeoutError and _cleanup() raises (permission denied), cleanup exception suppresses original error. Logs show wrong root cause.
evidence: Line 102-105: except Exception as e: logger.error(...) await self._cleanup() raise
_cleanup() line 425 catches exceptions but logs warning, not re-raised
findings.suggested_fix: Separate exception handling: track both original and cleanup errors independently using contextvars or ExceptionGroup (Python 3.11+).

findings.title: subprocess.run() uses capture_output=True but never reads pipes; large stderr blocks on full buffer
findings.why_it_matters: If FFmpeg writes >64KB error messages, stderr pipe fills and subprocess hangs. Deadlock: subprocess waits for drain, parent waits for exit.
evidence: Line 109-115: result = subprocess.run(..., capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=3600.0)
No check for pipe buffer size; 1-hour timeout does not prevent deadlock
findings.suggested_fix: Use stdout=PIPE, stderr=STDOUT to combine streams, or asyncio.create_subprocess_exec() for async reads.

findings.title: Mask file duplication creates mask_dir without validation; shutil.copy() can fail if mask_path invalid
findings.why_it_matters: Line 299 creates masks/ directory even if mask_path does not exist. shutil.copy() raises FileNotFoundError uncaught in _inpaint_crops. Exception propagates, loses all crops.
evidence: Line 296-303: mask_path setup and copy without validation
config_manager.py line 43-49 validates mask_path at load time only, not at inpaint time
findings.suggested_fix: Add early validation: before loop in _inpaint_crops(), assert self.config.mask_path exists. Use explicit error handling on shutil.copy().

findings.title: _cleanup() swallows all exceptions when deleting directories; partial deletion leaves orphaned temp files
findings.why_it_matters: Line 425-428 catches exceptions from shutil.rmtree() but continues. If crops_dir has permission denied, rmtree() partially succeeds, leaving orphaned images. Repeated runs accumulate garbage.
evidence: Line 427: except Exception as e: logger.warning(...)
No retry, no fail-fast, no indication to caller
findings.suggested_fix: Track cleanup failures in list and raise RuntimeError at end of _cleanup() if any occurred. Or delete files individually and aggregate errors.

findings.title: Timeout fallback via hasattr(config, 'timeout') is fragile; InpaintConfig has no timeout field
findings.why_it_matters: InpaintConfig defined in types.py with no timeout attribute. Line 97 always hits fallback 300.0s. If ProcessConfig.timeout=600s, inpaint_single() still uses 300s, causing premature timeout.
evidence: inpaint_executor.py line 97: timeout=config.timeout if hasattr(config, 'timeout') else 300.0
InpaintConfig (types.py lines 100-122) has no timeout field
ProcessConfig.timeout (line 150) is separate, never passed to InpaintConfig
findings.suggested_fix: Either: (1) add timeout field to InpaintConfig, (2) pass ProcessConfig.timeout explicitly to inpaint_batch(), or (3) use outer timeout envelope.

findings.title: await on sync function _extract_frames(); FrameExtractor.extract_frames() is not async
findings.why_it_matters: Line 56 awaits _extract_frames() which is async, but line 125 calls sync extractor.extract_frames() without run_in_executor(). Blocks event loop.
evidence: Line 107-136: _extract_frames() is async but internally calls sync extractor.extract_frames()
No await or run_in_executor; blocks event loop during frame extraction
findings.suggested_fix: Wrap sync call: await asyncio.get_event_loop().run_in_executor(None, extractor.extract_frames, ...) to free event loop.

findings.title: No validation that crops dict is non-empty after preprocessing; empty crops silently passed to inpainting
findings.why_it_matters: If all frames fail preprocessing and skip_errors_in_preprocessing=True, _preprocess_crops() returns empty dict. _encode_video() fails with generic error masking root cause.
evidence: Line 62: No check: if not crops: raise ValueError(...)
video_encoder.py line 81: raise FileNotFoundError(...)
findings.suggested_fix: Add guard after preprocessing: if not crops: raise RuntimeError(f'No frames produced after preprocessing (input={len(frames)})')

findings.title: Config default batch_size=4 may exhaust timeout under high load; no guidance on timeout/batch_size ratio
findings.why_it_matters: batch_size=4 x 300s timeout = up to 1200s per batch. If ComfyUI is slow, batch may exceed timeout. No automatic scaling or user guidance.
evidence: ProcessConfig line 147-148: batch_size: int = 4
ProcessConfig line 150-151: timeout: float = 300.0
No relationship enforced between batch_size and timeout
findings.suggested_fix: Add validation in ProcessConfig.__post_init__: if timeout / batch_size < 60: logger.warning('timeout per crop may be too tight')

residual_risks: Batch failure abort (P1): 10% crop failure leads to 10% frame dropout with no recovery path
Frame enumeration mismatch: _stitch_frames() skips frames not in inpainted dict, creating off-by-one output indexing on partial failure
Disk space exhaustion: if disk full during encoding, cleanup fails silently, filling disk further on retry
ComfyUI connection leaks: multiple InpaintExecutor instances or retries create connection leaks; no upper limit on concurrent connections
Timeout cascades: preflight 5s + inpaint 300s + encode 3600s = 3905s total. Single phase timeout cuts entire pipeline
Async deadlock: large crops (>1GB) with batch_size=4 may cause OOM during gather(), leaving temp files orphaned
Race condition in cleanup: cleanup() while _inpaint_crops() writing to inpainted_dir may cause rm -rf to delete in-flight output
testing_gaps: No test for partial batch failure: 5 crops with crop[2] timeout; verify crops 0,1,3,4 still processed
No test for cascading exceptions: preprocessing fails frame 5/10, inpaint called with 5 crops, verify frame indices align
No test for cleanup failure: make crops_dir read-only, verify _cleanup() reports failure
No test for timeout exhaustion: timeout=5s, batch_size=4, submit 100 crops, verify explicit TimeoutError
No test for async deadlock: simulate OOM during gather(), verify no orphaned processes
No test for connection pooling: submit 10 crops sequentially, verify only 1 session created
No integration test for skip_errors recovery: preprocessing+inpaint skip different subsets, verify frame count matches expected
No test for FFmpeg pipe buffer overflow: 1000-frame video with verbose logging, verify no deadlock
No fuzz test on config: timeout=0.1s, batch_size=100, CRF=999, verify validation catches invalid combinations
No test for cleanup race condition: spawn cleanup() while inpaint_executor writes to same output_dir
